design.description:
## Overview
Structured design exploration via parallel specialized analysts.
design.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

design-plan-impl.description:
## Overview
Convert design skill output into an executable implementation plan outline —
Mode A ONLY.
design-plan-impl.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

design-v3.description:
## Overview
Structured design exploration with constraint verification, dependency mapping,
and cross-dimension conflict detection for agents.
design-v3.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

design-v7.description:
## Overview
Sub-agent-based design orchestration that captures verbatim source in the main
context, then spawns three parallel sub-agents (Design Dimensions Analyst,
Architecture Elevation Analyst, Six-Sigma Gap Analyst) using Claude Code's
native Agent tool.
design-v7.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

fable-implement.description: Fixed-checklist implementation formula built on the aviation premise that safety comes from checklists nobody is allowed to skip, not from hoping every executor thinks like the best engineer.
fable-implement.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

fable-increment.description: Fixed-checklist incremental implementation formula aimed at the UNRESOLVED review comments of an existing pull request, built on the aviation premise that safety comes from checklists nobody is allowed to skip.
fable-increment.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

fable-review.description: Deep residence-powered code review of a pull request built on the refined aviation premise that the checklist doesn't fly the plane — the reviewer stays the pilot, and gates verify artifacts of execution, never opinions about opinions.
fable-review.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

factoryworker.description:
## Overview
Full agent work lifecycle from assignment through PR submission.
factoryworker.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

gherkin-breakdown.description:
## Overview
Create Gherkin scenarios from an English requirements document through iterative
drafting, review, and validation until the final `GHERKINSCENARIOS.
gherkin-breakdown.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

github-issue.description:
## Overview
Investigates a reported problem and produces a well-formed GitHub issue (or a
comment on an existing one) that gives an implementer everything they need to find
and understand the problem — without prescribing the fix.
github-issue.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

investigate.description:
## Overview 
Investigate a codebase question or bug with structured analysis
investigate.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

manager.directive: Read your memory and docs, and prove it.

mergepatrol.description:
## Overview
PR merge processor patrol loop.
mergepatrol.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

minimalworker.description: Minimal directive executor with no competing identity or lifecycle opinions.
minimalworker.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

rapid-implement.description:
## Overview
Lean, adaptive implementation workflow that classifies task complexity and scales process rigor accordingly.
rapid-implement.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

rapid-increment.description:
## Overview
Lean, adaptive incremental workflow that addresses the UNRESOLVED review comments on a pull request, scaling process rigor to the size of the change.
rapid-increment.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

rapid-soldesign-plan.description:
## Overview
Autonomous multi-agent rapid design refinement from a GitHub issue URI.
rapid-soldesign-plan.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

rootcause-all.description:
## Overview
Systematic root cause analysis on problems using 5-whys, fishbone diagrams,
and hypothesis testing.
rootcause-all.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

supervisor.description: Autonomous agent for independent task execution
supervisor.directive: Read your memory and docs, and prove it.

ultra-review.description: Multi-agent pull request review with five parallel specialized reviewers, confidence-scored filtering, and findings posted as inline review comments anchored to the PR diff.
ultra-review.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.

web-design.description: Transform a GitHub issue, GitHub PR, Jira issue, or problem-description document into an interactive, distinctively-designed web UI prototype through iterative exploration and human feedback.
web-design.directive: Run af prime to load formula context.
